author: Franz Balthasar (Balthasar de Porta)
title: Canon Sacratissime misse. vna cum expositione eiusdem
remarks: rapture' theology + Cistercian spirituality [Inc: Omnis creatura rationalis]; Glossed canon. Many handwritten notes suggest classroom setting?
